case_title: ALEXANDRA NICOLE LAWSON VS. YOUNGS MENS CHRISTIAN ASSOCIAITON OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT YOUNG MENS CHRISTIAN ASSOCIAITON OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT YOUNG MENS CHRISTIAN ASSOCIAITON OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAWSON, ALEXANDRA NICOLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YOUNG MENS CHRISTIAN ASSOCIAITON OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,499.00 FILED BY LAWSON, ALEXANDRA NICOLE AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG MENS CHRISTIAN ASSOCIAITON OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-21-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG MENS CHRISTIAN ASSOCIAITON OF SAN FRANCISCO

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAWSON, ALEXANDRA NICOLE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAWSON, ALEXANDRA NICOLE AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG MENS CHRISTIAN ASSOCIAITON OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDRA NICOLE LAWSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YOUNG MENS CHRISTIAN ASSOCIATION OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TROY KASNER DIRECTOR OF MEMBER SERVICES AND JACLYN O'BRIAN, RISK MANAGEMENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
